message:
feat: add session-start.sh hook with transcript_line_count tracking

Creates the SessionStart hook that publishes the canonical type bundle,
creates a cxdb context, writes initial session state (including
transcript_line_count: 0), gathers identity/provenance, handles
subagent lineage for nested sessions, and appends a system
ConversationItem marking the session start. Also adds
get_transcript_line_count helper to lib.sh and updates the schema
comment.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,134 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+# session-start.sh — SessionStart hook (synchronous)
+set -euo pipefail
+
+source "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/lib.sh"
+resolve_cxdb_url
+
+input=$(cat)
+session_id=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.session_id')
+cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cwd // ""')
+transcript_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.transcript_path // ""')
+permission_mode=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.permission_mode // ""')
+parent_session_id=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.parent_session_id // ""')
+
+# 1. Publish type bundle (idempotent)
+curl -sf -X PUT "${CXDB_URL}/v1/registry/bundles/cxdb-canonical-v3" \
+  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
+  -d @"${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/type-bundles/canonical-bundle.json" > /dev/null || true
+
+# 2. Create context
+context_response=$(curl -sf -X POST "${CXDB_URL}/v1/contexts/create" \
+  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
+  -d '{}' 2>/dev/null || echo "")
+context_id=$(echo "$context_response" | jq -r '.context_id // empty' 2>/dev/null || echo "")
+[ -z "$context_id" ] && exit 0
+
+# 3. Write initial state (include transcript_line_count: 0)
+write_state "$session_id" "$(jq -n \
+  --arg cid "$context_id" \
+  --arg tp "$transcript_path" \
+  '{"context_id": $cid, "transcript_path": $tp, "turn_number": 0, "tool_calls": [], "root_context_id": null, "transcript_line_count": 0}')"
+
+# 4-5. Gather identity
+git_email=$(get_git_email)
+git_name=$(get_git_name)
+project=$(get_project_name "$cwd")
+branch=$(get_branch_name "$cwd")
+hostname_val=$(hostname)
+arch_val=$(uname -m)
+owner_val=$(whoami)
+ts=$(now_ms)
+
+# 6. Build Provenance
+# parent_context_id and root_context_id are u64 in the type bundle, so we pass
+# context_id as a number. For the base Provenance we omit them; they are added
+# in the subagent block below if needed.
+provenance=$(jq -n \
+  --arg email "$git_email" \
+  --arg name "$git_name" \
+  --arg host "$hostname_val" \
+  --arg arch "$arch_val" \
+  --arg owner "$owner_val" \
+  --arg sid "$session_id" \
+  --argjson ts "$ts" \
+  '{
+    "on_behalf_of_email": $email,
+    "on_behalf_of": $name,
+    "on_behalf_of_source": "cli",
+    "host_name": $host,
+    "host_arch": $arch,
+    "process_owner": $owner,
+    "service_name": "claude-code",
+    "service_instance_id": $sid,
+    "sdk_name": "cxdb-observability-plugin",
+    "sdk_version": "1.0.0",
+    "captured_at": $ts
+  }')
+
+# 7. Subagent lineage
+if [ -n "$parent_session_id" ]; then
+  parent_cid=$(get_context_id "$parent_session_id")
+  if [ -n "$parent_cid" ]; then
+    parent_state=$(read_state "$parent_session_id")
+    # root_context_id falls back to parent's own context_id if not set
+    root_cid=$(echo "$parent_state" | jq -r '.root_context_id // .context_id')
+    # parent_context_id and root_context_id are u64 — convert strings to numbers
+    provenance=$(echo "$provenance" | jq \
+      --argjson pcid "$(echo "$parent_cid" | jq -R 'tonumber')" \
+      --argjson rcid "$(echo "$root_cid" | jq -R 'tonumber')" \
+      '. + {"parent_context_id": $pcid, "root_context_id": $rcid, "spawn_reason": "sub_agent"}')
+    # Also persist root_context_id in this session's state
+    state_now=$(read_state "$session_id")
+    write_state "$session_id" "$(echo "$state_now" | jq --arg rcid "$root_cid" '. + {"root_context_id": $rcid}')"
+  fi
+fi
+
+# 8. Build labels array
+labels=$(jq -n \
+  --arg email "$git_email" \
+  --arg project "$project" \
+  --arg branch "$branch" \
+  --arg host "$hostname_val" \
+  '["user:\($email)", "project:\($project)", "branch:\($branch)", "host:\($host)"]')
+
+# 9-10. Build payload with ContextMetadata and system ConversationItem
+payload=$(jq -n \
+  --arg cwd "$cwd" \
+  --arg session_id "$session_id" \
+  --arg permission_mode "$permission_mode" \
+  --arg transcript_path "$transcript_path" \
+  --arg project "$project" \
+  --arg branch "$branch" \
+  --argjson labels "$labels" \
+  --argjson provenance "$provenance" \
+  --argjson ts "$ts" \
+  '{
+    "type_id": "cxdb.ConversationItem",
+    "type_version": 3,
+    "data": {
+      "item_type": "system",
+      "status": "complete",
+      "timestamp": $ts,
+      "system": {
+        "kind": "info",
+        "title": "Session Started",
+        "content": "Claude Code session started in \($cwd)"
+      },
+      "context_metadata": {
+        "client_tag": "claude-code",
+        "title": "\($project)/\($branch)",
+        "labels": $labels,
+        "custom": {
+          "session_id": $session_id,
+          "cwd": $cwd,
+          "permission_mode": $permission_mode,
+          "transcript_path": $transcript_path
+        },
+        "provenance": $provenance
+      }
+    }
+  }')
+
+cxdb_append "$context_id" "$payload"
+exit 0
